modules.name: Attenuate
modules.description: Single-channel CV attenuator. OUT = IN x SCALE.

modules.name: ADSR
modules.description: Attack/Decay/Sustain/Release envelope generator. 0-10V output.

modules.name: Cassette
modules.description: Tape loop cassette player. 4 loop presets (CHORD/PAD/BASS/LEAD), tape quality modes (NEW/WORN/OLD), variable speed ±2 octaves, forward/reverse. Animated reel window.

modules.name: Crinkle
modules.description: Buchla 259-inspired wavefolder oscillator. Triangle core, 5-stage parallel center-clipper fold.

modules.name: Ladder
modules.description: TB-303-lineage Huovilainen nonlinear ladder filter with SPREAD/SHAPE pole topology control.

modules.name: Noise
modules.description: Six spectral noise generators: White, Pink, Brown, Blue, Violet, Crackle. Output only.

modules.name: Saphire
modules.description: Fixed-IR convolution reverb with operator transformations. Lex Hall IR, TIME/BEND/TONE/PRE controls.

modules.name: Sonic
modules.description: BBE-inspired spectral-phase maximizer. 3-band phase alignment + spectral tilt for perceived clarity and punch.

modules.name: Steel
modules.description: AI-driven wavetable stacker. Sidechain FFT analysis feeds Gemma inference to mix 16 wavetables in real time.

modules.name: BusCrush
modules.description: 8-channel summing bus with Mackie-style overload. Asymmetric rail clipping, envelope-dependent headroom, 8x oversampled bus stage. Pan CV per channel, stereo out.

modules.name: ClockDiv
modules.description: Clock divider with /2, /4, /8, /16, /32 outputs. Replacement for Autodafe/ClockDivider (not available on macOS ARM64).

modules.name: Tonnetz
modules.description: Trigger-addressed Tonnetz chord generator. Navigates a 5x5 lattice to produce voice-led triads. CV-controlled center, spread, and focus.

modules.name: Maurizio
modules.description: Clock-syncable dub delay with dotted/triplet ratio, HP-filtered feedback, and tape saturation. Basic Channel-style deep echo.

modules.name: KCK
modules.description: TR-909 inspired kick. Struck bridged-T resonator model: damped sine body with pitch-env glide, bandpassed click transient, tanh drive.

modules.name: LTM
modules.description: TR-909-inspired low tom. Analog shared-engine tom voice with faithful Tune, Decay, Level, and accent input.

modules.name: MTM
modules.description: TR-909-inspired mid tom. Analog shared-engine tom voice with faithful Tune, Decay, Level, and accent input.

modules.name: HTM
modules.description: TR-909-inspired high tom. Analog shared-engine tom voice with faithful Tune, Decay, Level, and accent input.

modules.name: HIHAT
modules.description: TR-909 inspired closed + open hi-hat in one module. Mirrors the original 909 hardware path where CH and OH share a single envelope/sound circuit, so a CH hit instantly mutes any sounding OH (the canonical hi-hat choke). Per Roland TR-909 OM, CH responds to Accent B (LACC) and both voices respond to Accent A (TACC; shared input). 14 HP.

modules.name: RIMCLAP
modules.description: Dual 909-style ROMpler utility: embedded clean clap and rim captures with trigger inputs and level controls only.

modules.name: SNR
modules.description: TR-909 inspired snare. Faithful Tune/Tone/Snappy/Level surface over two reset triangle VCOs, fixed binary noise, and split body/noise envelopes.

modules.name: TOM DBG
modules.description: Debug tom voice. Same engine as LowTom/MidTom/HighTom with all 17 internal fit parameters exposed as live knobs alongside Tune/Decay/Level. For dialing in voicing then copying values back into TomFit defaults.

modules.name: TOMS
modules.description: TR-909 inspired tom kit. Three voices (Low/Mid/High) sharing one engine; voices differ only by calibrated baseHz. Per-voice trigger, level, and audio output, plus a shared accent input.

modules.name: KCK DBG
modules.description: Debug kick voice. Same engine as Kck with the most informative KckFit parameters exposed as live knobs alongside the 7 user-facing controls. For dialing in voicing then copying values back into KckFit defaults.

modules.name: CRASHRIDE
modules.description: TR-909 inspired cymbal pair. Crash + Ride consolidated into a single 14HP module with independent Tune / Decay / Drive / Level per voice. Per-voice trigger and audio output, shared accent input. Same engine as the standalone Crash and Ride.

modules.name: 909 CTRL
modules.description: TR-909 global state controller. Four knobs (DEFAULT level, ACCENT A, ACCENT B, MASTER volume) plus CV inputs, broadcast to adjacent AgentRack 909 voices via the expander bus. DEFAULT scales the no-accent (ghost) case; ACCENT A scales any case where Accent A fires; ACCENT B scales any case where Accent B fires; MASTER scales final voice output. Consumed by every AgentRack 909 voice (Kck, Snr, Toms, ChhOhh, RimClap, CrashRide). Hit-time events (TRIG / LOCAL_ACC / TOTAL_ACC gates) travel via cables to each voice directly, NOT through this module. 8 HP.
